title: Integrated Seven Seas
description: Integrated  Seven Seas is a Mod that overhauls When Dungeons Arise - Seven Seas with integration
body:
![Integrated Seven Seas](https://i.imgur.com/gcCMXls.png)
# INTEGRATED SEVEN SEAS:
**Integrated Seven Seas** is a datapack/mod that overhauls heavily detailed structures of "**When Dungeons Arise - Seven Seas**", using blocks and mobs from Quark, Create, Supplementaries, and Farmer's Delight. Aditionally to all this, all the interiors designs of the structures have been revamped, with more enemies as well and a rebalanced loot for the early gameplay.

# Main Features
- **Structure Generation:** This mod/datapack improves the generation of all the ships, allowing them to spawn in the deep oceans only with smooth ocean around to avoid them getting close to other structures.

- **Worldgen Compatibility:** Lucky, Integrated API got their own tags for compatibility with other worldgen mods.

- **Loot Tables:** Another big revamp, was for all the loot tables of the mod, this was a big issue with the original mod that I decide to adrees by making the loot only worth it if you loot all the structure. 

# Credits:
This datapack/mod was a rework of all the structures of "[When Dungeons Arise - Seven Seas](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise-seven-seas)" made by  Aurelj, the main author of the original mod.

# Frequently Asked Questions:
**Q: What biome mods are compatible?**
A: Most biome and worldgen mods should be compatible, there are few mods that add some "deep ocean" biome.

**Q: Why are there so many dependencies?**
A: Yes.

**Q: Can I use this in my modpack?**
A: Yes! This project was made for go in company of IDAS and his addons, but if you use all the dependencies by itself, everything should be fine.

Q: How can I config this mod?
A: Since this is a datapack, is the same format as vanilla.

**Q: Why is the Victory Frigate missing?**
A: This structure is a mess for gameplay since it is massive for being in the ocean, without mentioning that has a lot of wool. I have no plans in add it unless I find a way to balance it and motivation to do it.

# Dependencies:
- Integrated API
- Create
- Quark
- Supplementaries
- Farmer's Delight
